nasb.text: So the other disciple who had first come to the tomb then also entered, and he saw and believed.

esv.text: Then the other disciple, who had reached the tomb first, also went in, and he saw and believed;

cnv.text: 那時，先到墳墓的那門徒也進去，他看見，就信了。

ccb.text: 先到的那个门徒也进来了，看见这种情形，就信了。

csbs.text: 这时候，先来到墓穴的那另一个门徒也进去了。他看见了，就信了。
